title.rendered: Two brands. One group. The same commitment to great value foreign exchange.

content.rendered:
Exciting News: IMS FX is Now Qu Money

If you’ve ever received our daily market insights email, you’ll already know the name IMS FX. For years, IMS FX has been our specialist arm for business foreign exchange, working closely with companies to help them manage international payments and protect themselves from the ups and downs of the currency markets.

Now, we’re thrilled to share some exciting news: IMS FX has officially transitioned to Qu Money.

What is Qu Money?

Qu Money is the new name and fresh brand identity for IMS FX. While the name has changed, the expertise remains the same. Qu Money continues to focus on helping growing businesses and SMEs with:

  • International payments that are fast, secure and great value.
  • Bespoke risk management tools to help companies protect against currency volatility.
  • Strategic FX solutions such as spot trades and forward contracts, designed to give finance teams confidence and control.

It’s a bold new chapter, with the same trusted service – just under a name that better reflects where we’re heading as a group.

What About Travel FX?

Don’t worry – nothing is changing at Travel FX.
 We’re still here for holidaymakers and individuals who want:

  • The best travel money exchange rates for their trips abroad.
  • Easy and competitive currency buybacks when they return.
  • Great value international money transfers for personal needs.

In short, Travel FX will continue to do what we do best: provide unbeatable value for travellers. Qu Money, meanwhile, will focus on the business side of international payments.

Why the Change?

The transition to Qu Money is part of our journey to make sure both our businesses and our customers have the specialist services they deserve. With Qu Money focused on the needs of businesses, and Travel FX continuing to look after holidaymakers, everyone benefits from tailored expertise.

What’s Next?

This is just the beginning for Qu Money. If you’re a Travel FX customer, you don’t need to do a thing – your travel money, buybacks and transfers will carry on exactly as before. If you’re curious about Qu Money, keep an eye out for updates in our market insights email and on our channels as the brand develops.

 

Two brands. One group. The same commitment to great value foreign exchange.

itemListElement.name: Two brands. One group. The same commitment to great value foreign exchange.

@graph.name: Travel FX Blog
@graph.description: Travel money news and tips from Travel FX

@graph.name: Lucy Reed
@graph.description: Hi! I’m Lucy, as well as writing blog posts I lead Customer Experience and UX at Travel FX. With over 15 years’ experience in the foreign exchange industry, I specialise in helping UK travellers understand exchange rates, avoid unnecessary fees, and feel confident about their travel money before they fly. Having lived both in the UK and overseas, and travelled extensively over the years, I understand first-hand how important it is to get the details right when you’re planning a trip. From managing your travel budget to choosing the right foreign currency or travel money card, small decisions can make a big difference.
